Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}You have a pretty good appetite. You even kept up with me... Hurp.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}How do you stay so thin, though? Looks really are deceiving, aren't they!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}But that means there are people out there who secretly want to take my title as Gourmet King! ...Eh, maybe.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Actually, remember that puny middle-aged guy from the other day!? I bet he was an assassin! ...Maybe.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}There's nothing I can do about it right now, but I'll show them soon enough! Just you wait.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}In light of your recent achievements and your courageous appetite, I hereby appoint you to the Gourmet King's royal guard![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}No, maybe that's too much of a burden for you to bear.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Suemitsu really seems to trust me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: Unused[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}By the way, you're a second-year, right, {f 4 2}-kun? So you're one year below me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 116 1 25 25}It kind of feels like I have a younger brother now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Well? Would you wanna be... my younger brother?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 13 19 15 116}You do sort of look like him... No, that's impossible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Sure, fine, whatever. I just thought you looked like someone is all, but I was wrong! You look nothing like him![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Whew, I knew this would happen! I always get hungry if I think about the past too hard.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}And I just filled up on that beef bowl, too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Better stay true to form and keep eating, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Here's to a healthy appetite courtesy of remembering the past! The ol' memory rewind![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}All right, now in reverse—let's moonwalk![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 116 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}What are you doing, {f 4 2}-kun? You're my royal guard. You have to join me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tagged along with Suemitsu[n]and had another beef bowl.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After eating, I parted ways with[n]Suemitsu and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
